column1: Smtp配置成功！为了保证Smtp邮件服务正常工作，请测试确认。

column1: 每个发件人用 code 标识，便于消息通知等模块通过 w_query 指定发件人并设置默认联系人。
column2: Each sender is identified with a code, allowing modules like notifications to specify the sender via w_query and set default contacts.

column1: 默认联系人：该发件人作为邮件渠道时的默认收件邮箱，可由系统管理员或 w_query 设置。
column2: Default Contact: The sender's default receiving email address when used as an email channel, can be set by the system administrator or w_query.

column2: Saved, enter new password to overwrite
